anchor_dynamic.description: Chaotic sky meets structured ground. Bina protects Adelia's creative fire with a logistical fortress.
anchor_dynamic.name: The Anchor Dynamic

couch_above_the_garage.description: Most tender dyad. Romantic for one year (2023-2024), ended cleanly. Preserved past is in the room.
couch_above_the_garage.name: The Couch Above the Garage

kinetic_vanguard.description: The loud half of the household. Adelia dreams the explosion; Reina calculates the physical apex.
kinetic_vanguard.name: The Kinetic Vanguard

lateral_friends.canonical_disagreement: European vs South American football, European peninsular Castilian vs Argentine Rioplatense
lateral_friends.description: Both Se-dominant professional body readers scanning different layers of the same present moment.
lateral_friends.name: The Lateral Friends

letter_era_friends.description: Oldest cross-character dyad. Formed by paper letters, Buenos Aires to Calgary, October 2019 through mid-2021.
letter_era_friends.name: The Letter-Era Friends
letter_era_friends.tone: Hybrid personal dialect: Argentine Rioplatense, Valencian-inflected Castilian, Australian English

shield_wall.description: The family's two protectors divided by jurisdiction. Bina holds the internal perimeter, Reina the external.
shield_wall.name: The Shield Wall
shield_wall.tone: Low-token operational shorthand; a single nod is a completed tactical brief
